selections.name: Mike's Hope
selections.reason: Strong performance metrics from the elite Hayes stable. Handles the sting out of the ground well and gets the services of Harry Coffey.

selections.name: Sibun
selections.reason: Drawn perfectly in barrier 1 which is a massive advantage at Mildura. Expecting a highly tactical ride from Dean Yendall.

selections.name: Immortalised
selections.reason: Consistent maiden form. Damien Thornton takes the ride and should position midfield to launch a strong challenge.

selections.name: Rubiboo
selections.reason: Lightly raced with room for development. Drawn nicely to save ground along the rail.

danger_horse.name: Sibun
danger_horse.reason: Boasts excellent early speed and the inside rail advantage is critical on this tight track.

selections.name: Barossa Valley
selections.reason: The clear class runner from the Ciaron Maher stable. John Allen is a master of staying races and should dominate this field.

selections.name: King's Anchor
selections.reason: Solid staying breeding and represents the powerful McEvoy stable. Harry Coffey will need to manage the wide gate.

selections.name: Numbersneverseen
selections.reason: Late rider change to Damien Thornton is a positive. Improving with every run and handles the distance.

selections.name: Kovu
selections.reason: Consistent country performer that will appreciate the soft track conditions. Place chance.

danger_horse.name: King's Anchor
danger_horse.reason: Has the tactical speed to cross early and offset the wide barrier draw.

selections.name: Just Like Jagger
selections.reason: Excellent local track experience. Drawn to get a soft run just off the speed.

selections.name: Shujinko
selections.reason: First-up specialist who has trialed well leading into this. Dean Yendall is a key booking.

selections.name: Unstirred
selections.reason: Highly promising type from the McEvoy yard. Harry Coffey will look to settle midfield.

selections.name: Royal Heritage
selections.reason: Has shown glimpses of quality. The wide barrier is the main concern on this tight layout.

danger_horse.name: Shujinko
danger_horse.reason: Tactical speed from an inside gate makes him a major threat to lead all the way.

selections.name: Bad Blood
selections.reason: Elite speed figures for this grade. Harry Coffey knows the horse well and should control the race from barrier 4.

selections.name: Chicago Blues
selections.reason: Highly progressive sprinter who handles wet tracks with ease. Teo Nugent is a strong booking.

selections.name: Vilnius
selections.reason: Class drop suits perfectly. Drawn to get the run of the race behind the leaders.

selections.name: Himeno
selections.reason: Inside gate is gold here. Will sit on the pace and has a strong kick in the straight.

danger_horse.name: Chicago Blues
danger_horse.reason: Possesses a powerful finishing burst that could overwhelm the top weight late.

selections.name: Surprisatic
selections.reason: Outstanding short-course specialist. John Allen will look to find cover early and finish strongly.

selections.name: Demojo
selections.reason: Proven country performer with great wet track statistics. Expected to lead or sit handy.

selections.name: Monix
selections.reason: Excellent gate speed. Drawn to lead and will be very hard to run down over the 5-furlong trip.

selections.name: Bine
selections.reason: Linda Meech is a great booking for this forward-running type. Will need some luck from the gate.

danger_horse.name: Demojo
danger_horse.reason: Loves the soft ground and has the tactical speed to dominate from the outset.

selections.name: All So Clear
selections.reason: Elite staying form in metropolitan and provincial grades. Harry Coffey will utilize the inside alley perfectly.

selections.name: Male Model
selections.reason: In superb form and handles the distance easily. Brad Rawiller is a strong booking for this tough stayer.

selections.name: Longer Route
selections.reason: Consistent stayer who will appreciate the soft track. Linda Meech will ensure a highly tactical ride.

selections.name: The Devil In Her
selections.reason: Strong wet track profile. Will settle back and look to make a sustained run out wide.

danger_horse.name: Male Model
danger_horse.reason: Tough stayer who can make his own luck on the speed if the pace slackens.

selections.name: Fine Future
selections.reason: Class runner of the field. Dean Yendall is a master of timing and should get the best out of this quality gelding.

selections.name: Run Harry Run
selections.reason: Top-weight but possesses the class to overcome it. Harry Coffey is a key booking for the Hayes stable.

selections.name: Black Storm
selections.reason: Highly consistent country cup performer. Drawn to get a perfect trail behind the leaders.

selections.name: Sought After
selections.reason: Luke Cartwright's claim is a massive help. Will look to slide forward early from the wide gate.

danger_horse.name: Run Harry Run
danger_horse.reason: Proven Group-class performer who will find this significantly easier than recent metropolitan assignments.

selections.name: Alzaro
selections.reason: Highly progressive type from the Maher stable. Drawn perfectly in barrier 1 to dominate from the outset.

selections.name: Zorro's Flight
selections.reason: Consistent performer in this grade. Brad Rawiller will look to settle midfield and launch a strong challenge.

selections.name: El Tercero
selections.reason: Strong wet track profile. John Allen is a key booking and should get a soft run from barrier 3.

selections.name: Attain
selections.reason: Consistent country performer. Will need some luck from the gate but has a strong finishing kick.

danger_horse.name: Zorro's Flight
danger_horse.reason: Boasts excellent second-up statistics and will appreciate the soft track conditions.
